bird.name: 游隼
bird.summary: 遊隼（學名：Falco peregrinus)，是隼属中较大的一種，又名花梨隼、鴨虎，在北美洲歷史上被稱為鴨鷹，是一種分布廣泛的猛禽（猛禽科），屬於隼科（Falconidae）。它體型較大，約與鴉屬鳥類相當，背部呈藍灰色，腹部為白色帶條紋，頭部為黑色。遊隼以其速度著稱。在其特有…

relations.subject: 游隼
relations.evidence: Reaching sexual maturity at one year, it mates for life and nests in a scrape, normally on cliff edges or, in recent times, on tall human-made structures. The peregrine falcon became an endangered species in many areas because of the widespread use of various pesticides, especially DDT
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: 游隼
relations.evidence: Reaching sexual maturity at one year, it mates for life and nests in a scrape, normally on cliff edges or, in recent times, on tall human-made structures. The peregrine falcon became an endangered species in many areas because of the widespread use of various pesticides, especially DDT
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

relations.subject: 游隼
relations.evidence: Since the ban on DDT from the early 1970s, populations have recovered, supported by large-scale protection of nesting places and releases to the wild. The peregrine falcon is a well-respected falconry bird due to its strong hunting ability, high trainability, versatility, and availability via captive breeding
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
